title: MikroTik Cloud Core Router, CCR2116-12G-4S+
description: Thanks to its very strong configuration, it is the perfect device for professionals in busy locations. There is 4x SFP+ with speed 1/10 Gbps and 13x 10 / 100 / 1000Mbps ethernet, console port type RJ45, 4 fans, 2 redundant power supplies with input voltage 100 - 240 V and M.2 PCI-e slot for SSD up to 8 TB RouterOS v7 level 6 is pre-installed, offering 128 MB of internal storage and 16 GB of DDR4 RAM . The maximum power consumption of the device is maintained at an acceptable 72 W with connected peripherals. Thanks to the new RouterOS v7, the router has up to 6 times higher performance when loading BGP (4) 1G/10G SFP+ (13) 10 / 100 / 1000Mbps Ethernet (1) console RJ45 port Processor AL731400, frequency 2 GHz, ARM 64bit 16GB RAM (DDR4) Storage 128 MB, NAND + M.2 PCI-e slot (unmounted) RouterOS v7, Level 6 operating system Dimensions 443 x 199 x 44 mm (4) 40 x 40mm fans (1) Devices (2) Power cord (1) 19 "rack mounts
